div.style: text-align: center; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 20px; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

tr.style: border-bottom: 1px solid #30363d; color: #8b949e; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase;

td.style: padding: 12px 15px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #ffffff; vertical-align: middle;

div.style: display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;

td.style: padding: 12px 15px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #ffffff; vertical-align: middle;

div.style: display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;

div.style: display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;

div.style: display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;
